# v0.1.0 (2026-06-20)

The initial public release of Crucible.

## Highlights

- 16 built-in review agents
- 5 LLM providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Bedrock, Ollama)
- 8 output formats
- Multi-perspective consensus scoring
- 15+ CLI commands
- Pluggable cache, plugins, providers, formatters
- TypeScript strict, 400+ tests
- Full docs site with 30+ pages
- Single-file bundle distribution
- Production-grade hardening (retries, circuit breaker, rate limiting)

## What's next

See the [ROADMAP](https://github.com/10xdev4u-alt/crucible/blob/main/docs/ROADMAP.md) for what's coming in 0.2 and beyond.

## Install

```bash
npm install -g crucible
```

## Quick start

```bash
crucible init
export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-...
crucible review
```

## Full release notes

See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/10xdev4u-alt/crucible/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md).
